About.heading: About Me
About.bio1: A Web Developer & Designer based in Japan, and organizer of the AI community "AI Sydney Club".
About.bio2: From web development and app creation to AI integration and Notion/GWS setup — I'm passionate about building experiences that change how people act through technology.

notionCards.sub: A collection of books I've read

notionCards.label: Bucket List
notionCards.sub: Things I want to challenge myself with

items.desc: Working as a freelancer centered on web development, delivering high-quality products with a modern tech stack.
Released a meal management app "Wotaberu" on the App Store. Built with Swift / SwiftUI.
The developed app was featured on the university's official news site.
Participated in an initiative to teach programming to local elementary school students.
Majored in software development, algorithms, and database design.

Services.heading: What I Can Do
Services.note: ※ Availability depends on the scope and content of the project. Feel free to reach out anytime.

items.title: Web Development
items.desc: Corporate sites, portfolios, and landing pages. Modern, high-performance sites built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS.

items.title: AI Integration
items.desc: Help integrating AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude into your workflow — from prompt design to internal guidelines.

items.title: Notion / GWS Setup
items.desc: Streamline your operations with Notion and Google Workspace. I'll help build systems that make information management effortless.

items.title: SNS Strategy
items.desc: Strategy and content design for X, Instagram, note, and more — backed by hands-on experience running the AI Sydney Club community.

posts.title: Immersive Scroll Animations with GSAP
posts.desc: How to bring cinematic experiences to your portfolio site using ScrollTrigger.

posts.title: Improving Core Web Vitals with Next.js 14
posts.desc: A real-world case of dramatically improving LCP, CLS, and INP with App Router and Server Components.

posts.title: Practical TypeScript Design Patterns
posts.desc: Patterns that shine in large-scale apps: Result type, Builder, Discriminated Union, and more.

Community.heading: AI Sydney Club
Community.desc1: An online community for those passionate about AI and technology.
Community.desc2: Let's discuss the latest AI trends, dev tips, and career paths together. Everyone from beginners to experts is welcome.
